skills.name: snap-refresh
skills.summary: Debugging snap refresh and update failures including held refreshes, gated updates, and channel tracking issues.

skills.name: snap-connections
skills.summary: Debugging snap interface connections, plug/slot issues, and permission denials.

skills.name: snap-services
skills.summary: Debugging snap services, systemd integration, and daemon lifecycle issues.

skills.name: snap-debug-state
skills.summary: Inspecting snapd internal state, changes, tasks, and seed debugging.

skills.name: journalctl
skills.summary: Using journalctl effectively for snapd and snap service log analysis.

skills.name: snap-debug-api
skills.summary: Making raw REST API calls to the snapd daemon socket for querying internal state, triggering operations, and debugging issues not exposed through the standard snap CLI.

skills.name: snap-debug-timings
skills.summary: Using snap debug timings to diagnose slow snap operations by showing detailed timing breakdowns for installs, refreshes, seeding, and other changes.

skills.name: lxd
skills.summary: Launching and managing LXD instances (VMs, containers, and nested containers) for bug reproduction.
